text:

diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/Makefile tor-devel/Makefile
--- tor-devel.orig/Makefile	Thu Dec  7 09:27:49 2006
+++ tor-devel/Makefile	Thu Dec  7 09:29:08 2006
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tor
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.2.3
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	security net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://tor.eff.org/dist/ \
 		http://mirror.onionland.org/dist/

--- tor-devel.orig/distinfo	Thu Dec  7 09:27:49 2006
+++ tor-devel/distinfo	Thu Dec  7 09:30:06 2006
